seoTitle: East Tamworth vs East Wardell — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between East Tamworth and East Wardell. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: East Tamworth vs East Wardell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in East Tamworth and East Wardell.
heading: East Tamworth vs East Wardell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between East Tamworth, New South Wales and East Wardell, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: East Wardell has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to East Tamworth (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is East Tamworth or East Wardell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: East Tamworth has a flood risk score of 27/100, while East Wardell scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: East Tamworth scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. East Wardell scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in East Tamworth or East Wardell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. East Wardell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
